title: Webcasts: ECB monetary policy decisions
summary: This is the ECB monetary policy press conference landing page, which serves as an index to past and upcoming Governing Council rate decisions. Current ECB rates (effective 11 June 2025): deposit facility at 2.00%, main refinancing operations at 2.15%, and marginal lending facility at 2.40%. The page references recent meetings on 5 February 2026 and 19 March 2026, with the next press conference scheduled for December.
key_points: Current ECB rates as of 11 June 2025: deposit facility 2.00%, main refinancing operations 2.15%, marginal lending facility 2.40%
Recent ECB Governing Council meetings referenced: 5 February 2026 and 19 March 2026
Next ECB press conference scheduled for December (specific date not stated)
Page provides access to press releases, statements, Q&A, visual statements, and audio streams for press conferences
Page includes macroeconomic projections and satellite downlink parameters for TV coverage
why_it_matters: This page is the central hub for accessing ECB monetary policy decisions and their accompanying documentation. The current rate levels (2.00%/2.15%/2.40%) reflect the ECB's policy stance as of mid-2025. Traders and analysts use this page to navigate to specific policy statements and press conference recordings for recent ECB decisions.
macro_context: ECB rates at deposit facility 2.00%, MRO 2.15%, MLF 2.40% represent the current policy rate corridor as of June 2025. The page references recent meetings in early 2026, suggesting the ECB has continued its rate-setting cycle through those dates. Specific decisions from the February and March 2026 meetings are not included in this source.

issues_found: PAGE_TYPE is listing_page - per Rule 5, listing pages must be rejected
event_type incorrectly set to 'rate_decision' but no rate decision is contained in this source; it is an index page linking to press conferences
Source is a navigation/listing hub with no substantive policy content - actual rate decisions require navigating to linked press releases
The rates shown (2.00%/2.15%/2.40%) are from 11 June 2025, over 9 months stale as of TODAY (2026-03-31)
Published_at set to TODAY is misleading - this index page has no specific publication date and is perpetually maintained
References to February and March 2026 meetings suggest they exist but the actual decisions are not included here

notes: This source is a navigation hub for ECB monetary policy press conferences rather than a standalone policy document. It contains current (as of June 2025) ECB rate levels and references to recent and upcoming Governing Council meetings. The source quality is limited because it is a listing page that links to policy documents rather than containing the documents themselves. SOURCE_TYPE is listing_page per PAGE_TYPE taxonomy. Published_at set to TODAY as no specific document publication date is associated with this index page.
